name: Sue's Simple Low Fat Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 180°C (350°F). Spray a quiche dish with non-stick baking spray.
2. Place fillings in dish and sprinkle cheese over.
3. In a bowl, combine custard ingredients in the following order: 150 ml milk, 2 eggs (1 egg + 1 egg white), 30 ml flour (ordinary white/whole wheat flour or corn flour), pinch of mixed herbs, and black pepper to taste. Beat well to remove any lumps.
4. Pour custard mixture over fillings and bake in the oven for approximately 35 minutes until set.
5. For an alternative method, cook in the microwave at 50-70% power for about 15 minutes until the custard is set. If necessary, brown off in the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
The above quantities are sufficient for a standard-sized quiche dish (approximately 25 cm in diameter). To make a larger version, double the ingredients and use a rectangular casserole dish.
